name: umbraculum-monorepo
description: AI-orchestrated open platform with composable vertical modules. Brewery seeded; MRP / WMS / CRM / CRP / automation next.

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @umbraculum/ai-tool-sdk && npm run build -w @umbraculum/i18n-keys && npm run build -w @umbraculum/i18n && npm run build -w @umbraculum/i18n-react && npm run build -w @umbraculum/navigation && npm run build -w @umbraculum/contracts && npm run build -w @umbraculum/module-sdk && npm run build -w @umbraculum/rendering && npm run build -w @umbraculum/pim-contracts && npm run build -w @umbraculum/automation-contracts && npm run build -w @umbraculum/mrp-contracts && npm run build -w @umbraculum/crp-contracts && npm run build -w @umbraculum/api-client && npm run build -w @umbraculum/ui && npm run build -w @umbraculum/brewery-beerjson && npm run build -w @umbraculum/brewery-recipes-ui && npm run build -w @umbraculum/media
scripts.test:packages: npm test -w @umbraculum/contracts && npm test -w @umbraculum/module-sdk && npm test -w @umbraculum/navigation && npm test -w @umbraculum/api-client && npm test -w @umbraculum/rendering && npm test -w @umbraculum/brewery-core && npm test -w @umbraculum/pim-contracts && npm test -w @umbraculum/mrp-contracts && npm test -w @umbraculum/crp-contracts
scripts.seed:e2e: docker compose exec -T api npm run seed:e2e
